channel.title: Hermes Audio Overviews
channel.description: AI-generated spoken explainers from links saved and published by Hermes.
channel.itunes:author: ilteris + Hermes
channel.itunes:summary: AI-generated spoken explainers from links saved and published by Hermes.

item.title: Carmack on HBM vs Flash for AI Inference
item.description: A two-host spoken explainer about John Carmack’s idea: use cheap NAND flash as a large model-weight store for AI inference, while keeping HBM/SRAM for hot working data.
item.itunes:author: ilteris + Hermes
item.itunes:summary: A two-host spoken explainer about John Carmack’s idea: use cheap NAND flash as a large model-weight store for AI inference, while keeping HBM/SRAM for hot working data.
